jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Cleartrip
jsonLd.description:
Cleartrip invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!
